data.label: Facility
data.description: The 'where'. Datacenters, cages, racks, power, cooling. The physical realm.

data.label: Network
data.description: The 'wire'. Packets, protocols, firewalls, load balancers. The connective tissue.

data.label: Platform
data.description: The 'metal'. Operating systems, hypervisors, containers, bare-metal shamanism.

data.label: Application
data.description: The 'code'. APIs, services, pipelines, yaml farming, dependency hell.

data.label: Data
data.description: The 'why'. The actual reason any of this exists. Bits with meaning.
